lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hey. So..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: First time Ive seen you at school.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: You must have missed school these last couple days then.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh yeah, thats likely.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Hope you havent said anything to anybody.

choices.text: Havent even had time to talk to anybody..
Sorry. I had to tell my father.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hey. So..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Tough evening?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Yeah..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah..

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Hope you havent said anything to anybody.

choices.text: Sorry. I had to tell my father.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Thats good. Thank you.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I keep promises, dont worry.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: But youve got to do something about it though no?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: As I said. I cant.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Call the police or something.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: And tell them what?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Firstly, its legal.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Secondly, like police are gonna believe me.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Thirdly, after the police leave father will kill me.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well I think getting whiped with a belt is worth the try..

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: No I mean like LITERALY kill me.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: what?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Hes scary sometimes and one time when he was drunk he..

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: well he started swinging the gun around.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: We have to go to the police like right now.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: NO!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Dude whatever you think is gonna happen is not gonna. They will help you!

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Im not in danger. But I will be if you go to the police.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: I already did once, okay?!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Do I look like it helped?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Mom was on his side and he..

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: he beat me.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Thats when he pulled the gun out.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Fine...

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: But we have to figure something out.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Got any ideas?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Not now. But we need to somehow get him.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Like kill him 'get him'?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: No! Like get him in jail or something. I dont know. Get you and your mom away from him.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Can I ask you something?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Why are you helping me?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Maybe because your dad is a psycho.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: No but like...you dont even know me or my family. We just moved here.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Guess Im just a good person, I dont know.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Or I really dont want somebody to die living opposite to where I live.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Doesnt really matter no?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Guess not.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Which class do you go to?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Nice. Sit by my right theres an empty spot usually.

menu_entry.text: Talked to David in school. Damn it I almost cried in school. Its really fucked up what happens in his family..

menu_entry.text: Talked to David in school. Damn it I almost cried in school. Its really fucked up what happens in his family..They move town every time people notice?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Hey. Whats up?

choices.text: Why are you not talking to anybody?
Have you thought of anything about the thing?
Your father asked me to get some more medicine.
Your father asked me to get some more medicine.
By the way, where do you hang out after school?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Not really..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: We need to catch him being abusive or something incriminating. Then show it to the police. They have to something then?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Maybe. Last time I spoke to them I didnt have anything to show.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: But it has to be concrete. Like no chance hell wiggle out of it you know?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Like a photo or a video of some sort. Do you have a camera?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Dad doesnt allow cameras or anything in the house.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well I assumed that but maybe hide it in a hidden spot?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: If he finds out..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: You cant keep living like this. You have to take some risks.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Well we dont have a camera anyway so we dont need to discuss that.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yup well we could buy one or borrow it from somebody.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Well thats something Id need help with since you know-

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Ive been here for less than a week.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well Ill look around town. Speak to friends.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Maybe we could also get your mom of the meds slowly and she could convince the police then?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Shes not a good actor. And the really doesnt want to stop as of now.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well what if we like replaced the drug? With like fake tablets?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Again If father finds out..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Then after she regains her senses we update her on the plan and she might want to help us.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Or she might tell dad..or she might not want to stop and get the meds. I dont know how she feels about anything anymore!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: ..Im really sorry David.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Its not that bad. At least dad doesnt give a shit about me cleaning my room or going to school. Hes jus satisfied I leave the house in the morning and thats that.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Sure..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well as I said Ill ask around town and see what I can do.

menu_entry.text: Gotta ask around town about the camera and maybe figure out some plan with replacing the tablets. The sooner the better.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: And you got them for him?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Should i?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: As I said, thats up to you.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Maybe hell give you something..

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: And you got them for him?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I shouldnt have?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: As I said, thats up to you.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: It doesnt change much.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: The thing is, he only asked for once and the lady gave me two..

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: So you got some?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah, we can see what it does.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Well we dont really need to see what it does. More like we need to somehow stop my mom from taking them.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well at least we have some evidence, and maybe we could tinker with these and then replace your moms.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: So what? Do we replace whats in the capsules with something else? It would need to taste the same.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: That sound like an idea.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: But we need to figure out how it tastes first.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: You really wanna taste it huh?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Dont you?-

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: We need to know what to replace it with so we gotta taste it.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Im not doing it. And besides couldt we like-

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: I dont know..

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Let somebody else taste it?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh so its immoral to try to taste it but its okay to roofie somebodies drink and then ask them for the taste?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Not like that! Like ask them if they would.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah, like anybody would willingly want to taste a drug.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Look, Ill try it, but promise me youll take care of me if I start seeing things haha.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Youre crazy.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hey Im helping you here!

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Youre. Crazy.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well you can go around trying to convince some junkie to test your drug and hope he wont snitch to your father or you can trust me.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Okay then. Its settled. Lets meet at the campfire near our stree and Ill test it there.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Ill meet you there after school.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: How observant of you! Well done.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: With such sarcastic comments I can also see why.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: I move town every couple months I have given up on making many friends

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah could have just said that instead of being smartypants about it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: And I can imagine that sucks.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Oh yeah how observant of you again.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Are you trying to not make any friends right now? Because if you havent noticed Im trying to help you.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Im sorry. Theres no excuse to be talking like that. Im just not in the mood to talk about my lack of friends right now.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Look. Try to talk to the guys in class. Ill introduce you. Even if its for a month or two itll be easier if you talk to people.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Sure I guess..

menu_entry.text: Every single time I talk to David I realise how sad his circumstances are..Nobody deserves these kind of conditions to live their life in.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: What thing?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: The movie 'The thing'

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: I dont watch many movies..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Its in the cinema this week...

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: ..great.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Dude are you touched?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Im inviting you to come with me to see it.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: I dont have any money.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Thats alright Ill pay if you wanna go.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: ..why are you doing this?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Do you wanna go?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Sweet. Theyre gonna screen it every evening at seven. We can go whenever.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: So wanna go see the thing?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: What thing are you talking about again?!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Jessus christ david-

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Im messing with you.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Huh..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Okay you got me there.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: See you there in an hour?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Yeah, Ive got a few things to do..but Ill be there.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Ready for The thing 2?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Wait its already out? The first out so long ago but I havent hear about the seq-

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Im bullshitting you.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh you fucking asshole.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: But it would be the best if they made it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: It would.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Uhh home?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Im not knocking on that door.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Well then-

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: I like to hang out around the campfire place near our house sometimes.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Wait the campfire near the forrest next to the town?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Are you kidding me?! I grew up in that place. I used to hang out there with my friends when I was little.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Were still 14.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Ehh you know what I meant. Like preschool era.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Sure. Well you know where to find me after school.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Ready for the taste test?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Are you?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Ready as Ill ever be.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: At least sit before trying so that I dont have to call an ambulance.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You sit and take out the medicine.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You pop open the lid and take one capsule into your hand.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well here goes nothing

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: This is the stupidest idea I have ever seen.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: One small step for man-

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Dont make it the corniest as well.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Okay..

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You swallow the tablet

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Hey Jessie!

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Wake up!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: You passed out.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: How long was I out for?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: A couple seconds. You popped the tablet, you closed your eyes and fell backwards.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Are you feeling alright?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I think Im okay. But you wont believe what I saw.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Did you dream?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: No..It felt real. Like I was controlling a computer.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: A computer?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah, but like inside of it you know?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Like inside of a computer case?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: No! Like I was a part of the software or something..going through the operating system.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I was browsing through files and opening them. Interacting with them changing them.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: A weird dream.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Thats the thing it didnt feel like one.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: And the weirdest thing is. I got out of it by openning a file.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: What file?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: A save file.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Like a game save file?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah. I think I was in there for only a couple seconds too. That would align wih how long I was out.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Dreams usually dont..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Damn, this is weird.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Lets leave, I feel like somebody is watching us..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: ..Yeah
